headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://maps.googleapis.com https://www.google-analytics.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.google.com https://*.googleapis.com https://images.unsplash.com https://*.unsplash.com https://*.googleusercontent.com https://img.icons8.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.google.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://*.cloudfunctions.net https://*.a.run.app;
